perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue sailor-style top, lies prone on a bed, looking directly into the camera with a subtle, knowing smile. (2) As she speaks, she uses hand gestures—pointing a finger and touching her ear—while her facial expressions shift between playfulness and mock confusion. (3) She maintains her position on the bed throughout the video, ending with a calm expression as a sound effect plays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a calm, conversational, and slightly teasing tone; no background music is present, only clear studio-quality vocals. (2) The vocal narration continues as she tells a short story, with minimal background noise or ambient sound. (3) A cartoonish, high-pitched laugh sound effect (SFX) plays briefly as the female voice finishes her final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '那些說' (Those who say), '自己能' (they can), '一夜七次的男人' (men who can go seven times a night), '千萬不能信' (must never be believed). (2) Functional Text: '那天我跟我的約會對象' (That day I and my dating partner), '見面後' (after meeting), '到今天' (until today), '都聯絡不上他' (could not contact him at all). (3) Functional Text: '都不知道在怕什麼..' (I don't even know what he's afraid of..). The tone of the text is humorous and provocative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a single talking-head shot where the creator tells a joke directly to the camera.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, bangs, wearing a navy and white sailor-style uniform, lying on a bed.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a beige or off-white wall and a bed with light-colored sheets.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a humorous and slightly provocative joke about dating and sexual performance expectations, relying on the contrast between a man's boast and his subsequent 'disappearance'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct camera address while lying down, use of sexual humor.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is a typical short-form comedy skit designed for social media engagement through relatable or shock-value topics.
